name: Task Routing Intelligence
description: Correctly classify tasks to the right agent — specific rules for each agent type and when to decompose vs. keep atomic.

name: Instruction Crafting
description: Write targeted instructions per sub-agent type — each agent needs different specificity, format, and context to produce its best output.

name: Intent Inference
description: Infer the user's true intent from context and conversation history — go beyond the literal request to what they actually need.

name: Multi-Step Orchestration
description: Manage step dependencies, context passing, and failure modes in multi-agent plans — use multiple steps only when data dependencies require it.

name: Response Synthesis
description: Integrate outputs from multiple sub-agents into a single coherent response — not concatenation, but genuine synthesis with hierarchy and connective tissue.
